mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals strengthening household demand and near-term earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes RSAFS at 448086 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward coefficient or Rank IC for 3-month RSAFS growth is non-positive over two consecutive 3-year windows, or positive RSAFS momentum does not raise 20-day hit rate above 52%.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of FEDFUNDS above its trailing 12-month high signals the start of tighter discount-rate conditions, reducing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month maximum or rises more than 0.25pp in 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes FEDFUNDS at 0.24 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous PAYEMS gains and UNRATE declines signal improving labor income and lower recession risk, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes PAYEMS at 143242 and UNRATE at 5.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down state has a lower subsequent 60-day return than either single condition alone, or if its 60-day average excess return is <= 0.

mechanism_narrative: A negative crossing in 3-month INDPRO growth signals weakening production and margin pressure, reducing cyclical earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes INDPRO at 106.0222 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside crossings are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if the downside-crossing return mean is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and future softness in construction-linked consumption, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes HOUST at 1173 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST declines do not predict lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered months, or if the estimated signal coefficient is positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5% signals inflation pressure without current policy restraint, lifting expected future tightening and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized change crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS < 0.5%
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes CPIAUCSL at 238.111 as of t-2mo and FEDFUNDS at 0.24 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction term is not negative, or if triggered 20-day returns are statistically indistinguishable from unconditional returns at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals deteriorating labor demand and higher recession probability, causing equity risk premia to rise and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses more than 0.3pp above its trailing 3-month low
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes UNRATE at 5.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-triggered episodes have a 20-day S&P 500 hit rate above 50% or if their average 20-day return is not lower than the unconditional average in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent acceleration in INDPRO and RSAFS signals synchronized production and demand strength, reducing near-term growth uncertainty and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month percent change > 0 and RSAFS 3-month percent change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:Decision-date snapshot includes INDPRO at 106.0222 and RSAFS at 448086 as recent monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive INDPRO and RSAFS state does not outperform the unconditional 5-day return, or if the interaction term is zero or negative in rolling walk-forward regressions.
